chapter_title.ar: باب مَا لَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ الزَّكَاةُ مِمَّا تُنْبِتُ الْأَرْضُ مِنَ الْخُضَرِ وَ غَيْرِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 6 – What the Zakāt is not Obligated upon, from the vegetation of the earth, from the greenery and other than it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/25)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/25)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْأُشْنَانِ فِيهِ زَكَاةٌ فَقَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ismail Bin Marrar and someone else, from Yunus who said,
‘I asked Abu Al-Hassanasws about the potash,’Is there Zakāt regarding it?’ So heasws said: ‘No’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ill ibn Marrar and others from Yunus who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, if there is Zakat on saltwort. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, Zakat is not due on it.’”
